global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with a prominent logo and clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to try the service for free.

elements.label: red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: StarVault logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'StarVault' in bold, modern typography, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: abstract shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping abstract shapes, one circular and one square, are rendered in a lighter shade of red, adding visual interest.

elements.label: additional shapes
elements.description: Additional abstract shapes in a lighter hue, contributing to the overall design without a specific identifiable function.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: A small circular element in a lighter color, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: small rectangle
elements.description: A small rectangular element in a lighter color, located near the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: Another small circular element in a lighter color, positioned towards the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: small decorative element
elements.description: A tiny decorative element in a lighter color, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: main headline
elements.description: The headline reads 'A new season drops' in bold, white text, centrally positioned for emphasis.
elements.text_content: new season drops Start free today

elements.label: subheadline
elements.description: The subheadline 'Start free today' is displayed in a smaller font below the main headline, also in white.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A prominent button labeled 'Try for free' in white text on a contrasting background, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: The label 'UGC' is displayed in a small, white font at the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bold and modern, StarVault logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main headline and subheadline in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: StarVault, UGC, A new season drops, Start free today, Try for free
